name: NONE
desc: no ability. wildcard also uses this ability, but has strength set to 0.

name: PLAY ANOTHER
desc: Play another card and invoke ability

name: DISCARD SURROUNDING
desc: Discard a chosen enemy directly next to this card face-up

name: PLACE ANYWHERE
desc: Exempt from linked to own HQ requirement

name: DISCARD FROM ENEMY HAND
desc: Discard one random card from enemy's hand face-up

name: SURROUNDING ABILITY
desc: Invoke ability of one chosen surrounding card (allied or enemy)

name: UNDISCARD 1
desc: Return 1 card at random from own face up discarded pile to reserve

name: UNDISCARD 2
desc: Return 2 cards at random from own face up discarded pile to reserve

name: CHOICE OF 3
desc: Choose one card from one of three opened from reserve pile and add it to hand; other two are mixed back into reserve
